1: module EdgeCache
2:   class BustArticle
3:     TIMEFRAMES = [
4:       [-> { 1.week.ago }, "week"],
5:       [-> { 1.month.ago }, "month"],
6:       [-> { 1.year.ago }, "year"],
7:       [-> { 5.years.ago }, "infinity"],
8:     ].freeze
9:     def self.call(article)
10:       return unless article
11: 
12:       article.purge
13:       article.user&.purge
14:       article.organization&.purge
15: 
16:       cache_bust = EdgeCache::Bust.new
17: 
18:       bust_home_pages(cache_bust, article)
19:       bust_tag_pages(cache_bust, article)
20:       bust_user_profile_pages(article)
21:     end
22: 
23:     def self.bust_home_pages(cache_bust, article)
24:       if article.published_at.to_i > Time.current.to_i
25:         # TODO
26:         cache_bust.call("/")
27:       end
28: 
29:       if article.video.present? && article.published_at.to_i > 10.days.ago.to_i
30:         cache_bust.call("/videos")
31:       end
32: 
33:       TIMEFRAMES.each do |timestamp, interval|
34:         next unless Article.published.where("published_at > ?", timestamp.call)
35:           .order(score: :desc).limit(3).ids.include?(article.id)
36: 
37:         cache_bust.call("/top/#{interval}")
38:       end
39: 
40:       if article.published && article.published_at > 1.hour.ago
41:         cache_bust.call("/latest")
42:       end
43: 
44:       cache_bust.call("/") if Article.published.order(hotness_score: :desc).limit(4).ids.include?(article.id)
45:     end
46: 
47:     private_class_method :bust_home_pages
48: 
49:     def self.bust_tag_pages(cache_bust, article)
50:       return unless article.published
51: 
52:       article.tag_list.each do |tag|
53:         if article.published_at.to_i > 2.minutes.ago.to_i
54:           cache_bust.call("/t/#{tag}/latest")
55:         end
56: 
57:         TIMEFRAMES.each do |timestamp, interval|
58:           next unless Article.published.where("published_at > ?", timestamp.call).cached_tagged_with_any(tag)
59:             .order(score: :desc).limit(3).ids.include?(article.id)
60: 
61:           cache_bust.call("/top/#{interval}")
62:           12.times do |i|
63:             cache_bust.call("/api/articles?tag=#{tag}&top=#{i}")
64:           end
65:         end
66: 
67:         next unless rand(2) == 1 &&
68:           Article.published.cached_tagged_with(tag)
69:             .order(hotness_score: :desc).limit(2).ids.include?(article.id)
70: 
71:         cache_bust.call("/t/#{tag}")
72:       end
73:     end
74: 
75:     private_class_method :bust_tag_pages
76: 
77:     def self.bust_user_profile_pages(article)
78:       return unless article.user
79: 
80:       EdgeCache::PurgeByKey.call(
81:         article.user.profile_cache_keys,
82:         fallback_paths: article.user.profile_cache_bust_paths,
83:       )
84:     end
85: 
86:     private_class_method :bust_user_profile_pages
87:   end
88: end

todos.content: Step 1: Orient in the codebase - map project structure and central content model
Step 2: Map the Article contract and shared pieces it includes
Step 4: Audit every dependent of the Article contract by area
Step 5: Trace article identity and visibility guards
Step 6: Assess blast radius and rank risks

content.text:
## Step 1 — Orient in the codebase

This is **Forem**, the Rails application that powers dev.to. Code is organized as a standard Rails monolith:

- **Models / domain**: `app/models/` — central entities and concerns
- **Services**: `app/services/` — business operations, often the real orchestration layer
- **Workers**: `app/workers/` — Sidekiq background jobs
- **Queries**: `app/queries/` — reusable query objects
- **Controllers / API**: `app/controllers/`, `app/controllers/concerns/api/`
- **Liquid tags**: `app/liquid_tags/`
- **Tests**: `spec/` (RSpec), `spec/factories/`

The central content model is **`Article`** at `app/models/article.rb:1`. Readers publish it; comments, reactions, tags, mentions, notifications, page views, feed events, polls, context notes, concepts, trends, and search/feeds all attach to it. It builds on `ApplicationRecord` (`app/models/application_record.rb:1`) and a set of shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/`.

---

## Step 2 — Map the Article contract

### Core model
- `app/models/article.rb:1` — `class Article < ApplicationRecord`

### Shared behavior it includes
- `LiquidEmbeddable` — `app/models/concerns/liquid_embeddable.rb:1`  
  Adds `has_many :liquid_embed_references` and `after_commit` hooks to sync embed metadata when `body_markdown` or publish/score fields change.
- `Reactable` — `app/models/concerns/reactable.rb:1`  
  Adds `has_many :reactions` / `distinct_reaction_categories` and reaction-count sync helpers.
- `Taggable` — `app/models/concerns/taggable.rb:1`  
  Adds `cached_tagged_with*` scopes and a `before_save :sync_tags_array` callback.
- `UserSubscriptionSourceable` — `app/models/concerns/user_subscription_sourceable.rb:1`  
  Adds `has_many :user_subscriptions` / `sourced_subscribers`.
- `AlgoliaSearchable::SearchableArticle` — `app/models/concerns/algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb:1`  
  Adds Algolia indexing with `indexable` / `indexable_changed?`.
- `WebpageTrackable` — `app/models/concerns/webpage_trackable.rb:1`  
  Adds `has_many :webpage_references` and sync workers on create/update/destroy.
- `Purgeable` — inherited via `ApplicationRecord`, `app/models/concerns/purgeable.rb:1`  
  Adds Fastly edge-cache `purge` methods.

### Key associations other records hang off
`app/models/article.rb:168-205`
- `has_one :discussion_lock, dependent: :delete`
- `has_many :mentions, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :comments, dependent: :nullify`
- `has_many :context_notifications, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :feed_events, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :notification_subscriptions, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :notifications, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :page_views, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_one :article_activity, dependent: :delete`
- `has_many :polls, dependent: :destroy`
- `has_many :profile_pins, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :rating_votes, dependent: :destroy`
- `has_many :tag_adjustments`
- `has_many :context_notes, dependent: :delete_all`
- `has_many :trend_memberships, dependent: :destroy`
- `has_many :concept_memberships, dependent: :destroy`

Also belongs to `user`, optional `organization`, optional `collection`, optional `subforem`, and `counter_culture` on user/organization.

### Contract caveats
- Many lifecycle effects are **not** in the model file; they are delegated to services and Sidekiq workers via callbacks.
- `comments` use `dependent: :nullify`, so destroying an article leaves orphaned comments that lose their `commentable` but keep their notifications unless explicitly cleaned (`Articles::Destroyer`).
- `tag_adjustments` has **no** `dependent` option; deleting an article may leave stale `TagAdjustment` rows.
- `counter_culture` skips Active Record callbacks — do not rely on model callbacks for reaction/comment counter side effects.

---

## Step 3 — Trace article lifecycle effects

### Create
Entry point: `Articles::Creator.call` — `app/services/articles/creator.rb:26`
1. Builds `Article.new` (`creator.rb:71`), sets `user_id`, `show_comments: true`.
2. Saves article; if persisted, attaches series/collection via `update_column` (`creator.rb:89-94`).
3. Subscribes author to all comments (`creator.rb:109-112`).
4. If published: refreshes auto-audience segments and completes onboarding first-post checklist (`creator.rb:30-32`).

Article callbacks fired on create (`app/models/article.rb`):
- `before_validation` lines 295-304: status URL extraction, markdown eval, slug, published date, etc.
- `before_save` lines 305-311: cache entities, dates, base scores, video duration, caches, language.
- `before_create` line 312: `create_password`.
- `after_save` lines 315-319: spam handling, cache bust, collection cleanup, social image, context notes.
- `after_commit` lines 334-345: embedding, score calc, collection touch, image enrichment, code-block detection, org page recompile.
- Concern callbacks:
  - `LiquidEmbeddable` — `queue_liquid_embed_sync` on create if body changed.
  - `WebpageTrackable` — `queue_webpage_sync` on create if body changed.
  - `Taggable` — `sync_tags_array` before save.
  - `AlgoliaSearchable` — Algolia index worker on create if `indexable`.

### Update
Entry point: `Articles::Updater.call` — `app/services/articles/updater.rb:15`
1. Normalizes params via `Articles::Attributes` (`updater.rb:50`).
2. Calls `article.update(article_params)` (`updater.rb:17`).
3. On success:
   - If became unpublished: removes notifications, busts author cache (`updater.rb:22-25`).
   - If remains published: calls `Mentions::CreateAll.call(article)` inline (`updater.rb:27`, `updater.rb:78-80`).
   - If became published: refreshes segments and onboarding (`updater.rb:28-29`).

Article callbacks on update are the same create/update set listed above, plus `after_update_commit` hooks:
- `update_notifications` if notifications exist (`article.rb:321-323`)
- `update_notification_subscriptions` if `user_id` changed (`article.rb:324-326`)
- `update_dependent_embeds_if_key_info_changed` (`article.rb:1844-1857`)
- `regenerate_summary_if_content_changed` (`article.rb:1069-1077`)

### Destroy
Entry point: `Articles::Destroyer.call` — `app/services/articles/destroyer.rb:5`
1. Caches `article.comments.ids` before destroy because comments are nullified (`destroyer.rb:11`).
2. `article.destroy!` triggers model associations and `before_destroy :before_destroy_actions` (`article.rb:313`, `article.rb:1408-1420`).
3. After destroy:
   - `Notification.remove_all(notifiable_ids: article.id, notifiable_type: "Article")` (`destroyer.rb:15`)
   - `Notification.remove_all(...notifiable_type: "Comment")` for cached comment ids (`destroyer.rb:17-19`)
   - `EdgeCache::BustUser.call(author)` (`destroyer.rb:21`)

`before_destroy_actions` (`article.rb:1408`):
- Busts cache (`bust_cache(destroying: true)`).
- Touches org `last_article_at`.
- Enqueues `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker` for the author’s other articles.

### Inline vs async fan-out

| Layer | Runs | Key locations |
|-------|------|---------------|
| Markdown processing, slug, validation, cache columns | Inline | `article.rb:295-312` |
| Notification subscription creation | Inline | `creator.rb:109` |
| Mentions creation on update | Inline | `updater.rb:79`, `mentions/create_all.rb:14` |
| Cache purge (Fastly record key) | Inline | `Purgeable#purge`, `article.rb:1663` |
| Spam handling, score calc, social image, image enrichment, code-block detection, embedding, dependent embeds, org page recompile | Async (Sidekiq) | `article.rb:315-345`, `article.rb:1033-1055`, `article.rb:1844-1857` |
| Webpage/liquid-embed reference sync | Async | `liquid_embeddable.rb:7-8`, `webpage_trackable.rb:7-9` |
| Algolia reindex | Async via gem worker | `searchable_article.rb:36-39` |
| Comment/reaction counter updates | Counter-culture (inline DB triggers, no AR callbacks) | `article.rb:50-51`, `reactable.rb:5-11` |

---

## Step 4 — Audit every dependent of the Article contract

Grouped by area. Each line is a concrete dependent with `file:line` and a one-phrase usage.

### Request handling (controllers)
- `app/controllers/admin/articles_controller.rb:2` — admin CRUD, pinning, feature toggles on articles
- `app/controllers/admin/tools_controller.rb:2` — manual article cache bust
- `app/controllers/admin/welcome_controller.rb:2` — creates/reads welcome thread article
- `app/controllers/ahoy/email_clicks_controller.rb:2` — records feed events against articles
- `app/controllers/article_approvals_controller.rb:1` — toggles `approved` on article
- `app/controllers/articles_controller.rb:1` — create/update/destroy/feed/preview article endpoints
- `app/controllers/billboards_controller.rb:1` — selects billboards with `exclude_article_ids`
- `app/controllers/bottom_items_controller.rb:1` — fetches random bottom article
- `app/controllers/comments_controller.rb:1` — loads `Article` as commentable
- `app/controllers/community_controller.rb:1` — latest community articles
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/analytics_controller.rb:131` — analytics floor from articles
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/articles_controller.rb:31` — API index/show/create/update/unpublish
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/comments_controller.rb:13` — API comments on articles
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/readinglist_controller.rb:11` — reading list reactions on articles
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/trends_controller.rb:19` — trending articles API
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/videos_controller.rb:10` — video articles API
- `app/controllers/dashboards_controller.rb:25` — author dashboard article lists
- `app/controllers/discussion_locks_controller.rb:1` — locks discussion on article + busts cache
- `app/controllers/events_controller.rb:6` — event detail may use article path
- `app/controllers/moderations_controller.rb:64` — moderation panel loads article
- `app/controllers/pages_controller.rb:119` — welcome/challenge/checkin pages fetch articles
- `app/controllers/reactions_controller.rb:1` — reactions on articles
- `app/controllers/sidebars_controller.rb:25` — active discussions / recent pageviews from articles
- `app/controllers/sitemaps_controller.rb:24` — sitemap indexes over articles
- `app/controllers/stories/feeds_controller.rb:141` — following latest/relevant feeds
- `app/controllers/stories/pinned_articles_controller.rb:26` — pins/unpins articles
- `app/controllers/stories_controller.rb:62` — article show / user stories / feed assignment
- `app/controllers/tag_adjustments_controller.rb:1` — moderator tag changes on articles
- `app/controllers/trends_controller.rb:21` — trend page uses articles
- `app/controllers/video_states_controller.rb:6` — video state transitions for articles
- `app/controllers/videos_controller.rb:5` — video article listings

### Models that depend on Article
- `app/models/async_info.rb:32` — user async payload includes article data
- `app/models/billboard.rb:477` — derives `exclude_article_ids` from articles
- `app/models/campaign.rb:59` — campaign article scope
- `app/models/comment.rb:1` — commentable is Article; callbacks for score, notifications, activity
- `app/models/feed_event.rb:70` — updates single-article counters
- `app/models/notification.rb:64` — `send_to_mentioned_users_and_followers` only for published full_post Article
- `app/models/pinned_article.rb:19` — pinned article accessor
- `app/models/reaction.rb:1` — reactable is Article; extensive article-specific callbacks/scopes
- `app/models/tag.rb:289` — tag hotness score uses articles
- `app/models/user.rb:408` — `followed_articles`, reading list, cached articles
- `app/models/user_activity.rb:15` — tracks article-related activity

### Query objects
- `app/queries/articles/api_search_query.rb:46` — searches published articles
- `app/queries/audit_log/unpublish_alls_query.rb:21` — audit unpublish events on articles
- `app/queries/comments/tree.rb:5` — comment tree for Article commentables
- `app/queries/homepage/articles_query.rb:31` — homepage article query
- `app/queries/organizations/suggest_prominent.rb:28` — org prominence from articles
- `app/queries/users/suggest_prominent.rb:27` — user prominence from articles

### Services — core article lifecycle
- `app/services/articles/attributes.rb:2` — param normalization for update
- `app/services/articles/builder.rb:2` — builds new Article instances for editor
- `app/services/articles/creator.rb:2` — persists new articles
- `app/services/articles/destroyer.rb:2` — destroys article + notifications
- `app/services/articles/unpublish.rb:2` — flips published flag via Updater
- `app/services/articles/updater.rb:2` — updates articles, handles publish/unpublish transitions
- `app/services/articles/page_view_updater.rb:18` — records page views on articles

### Services — feeds and ranking
- `app/services/articles/feeds/basic.rb:12` — default home feed
- `app/services/articles/feeds/custom.rb:60` — optimized base query
- `app/services/articles/feeds/find_featured_story.rb:19` — featured story selection
- `app/services/articles/feeds/large_forem_experimental.rb:74` — large forem hot stories
- `app/services/articles/feeds/tag.rb:4` — tag feed

### Services — notifications and mentions
- `app/services/mentions/create_all.rb:5` — creates mentions/notifications for articles
- `app/services/notifications/moderation/send.rb:5` — moderation notifications for articles
- `app/services/notifications/new_mention/send.rb:18` — mention notification for Article
- `app/services/notifications/notifiable_action/send.rb:19` — “Published” follower notifications for Article
- `app/services/notifications/update.rb:14` — updates notification JSON data for Article/Comment
- `app/services/notification_subscriptions/subscribe.rb:42` — subscribes to article comments

### Services — caching
- `app/services/edge_cache/bust_article.rb:2` — busts article, user, org, home/tag/profile caches
- `app/services/edge_cache/bust_comment.rb:11` — busts article when comment cache is busted
- `app/services/images/generate_social_image_magickally.rb:20` — generates social image for Article

### Services — analytics, metrics, badges, moderation
- `app/services/admin/charts_data.rb:7` — admin charts use article counts
- `app/services/admin/stats_data.rb:7` — admin stats use articles
- `app/services/ai/chat_service.rb:22` — AI chat may fetch article context
- `app/services/ai/trend_detector.rb:25` — trend detection on articles
- `app/services/analytics_service.rb:197` — analytics dashboard loads article data
- `app/services/article_api_index_service.rb:45` — API article index
- `app/services/article_with_video_creation_service.rb:9` — video article creation
- `app/services/badges/award_first_post.rb:5` — first-post badge checks articles

### Background workers that operate on Article
- `app/workers/articles/backfill_activities_worker.rb:17` — backfills `ArticleActivity`
- `app/workers/articles/bust_cache_worker.rb:3` — async cache bust for article
- `app/workers/articles/bust_multiple_caches_worker.rb:3` — bust caches for author’s other articles
- `app/workers/articles/detect_code_block_languages_worker.rb:7` — AI code-language detection
- `app/workers/articles/enrich_image_attributes_worker.rb:7` — image dimension/color extraction
- `app/workers/articles/generate_context_note_worker.rb:2` — tag-based context note generation
- `app/workers/articles/generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:2` — freeform context note generation
- `app/workers/articles/generate_summary_worker.rb:2` — AI summary generation
- `app/workers/articles/handle_spam_worker.rb:7` — spam handling + AI enhancement
- `app/workers/articles/publish_worker.rb:2` — scheduled publish worker
- `app/workers/articles/quality_reaction_worker.rb:2` — quality reaction processing
- `app/workers/articles/score_calc_worker.rb:7` — recomputes `score`, `hotness_score`, etc.
- `app/workers/articles/update_article_activity_worker.rb:17` — updates denormalized activity from comments/reactions/pageviews

## Step 5 — Trace article identity and visibility guards

### “Does the article still exist?”
Most background workers reload by primary key and early-return if missing:

- `app/workers/articles/score_calc_worker.rb:8-9` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/bust_cache_worker.rb:4-6` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/handle_spam_worker.rb:8-9` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/enrich_image_attributes_worker.rb:8-9` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/detect_code_block_languages_worker.rb:10-11` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb:7` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/generate_summary_worker.rb:13` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/generate_context_note_worker.rb:8` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/articles/generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:9` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article`
- `app/workers/generate_article_embedding_worker.rb:6-7` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article && article.published?`
- `app/workers/update_user_interest_embedding_worker.rb:7-8` — checks article exists and has embedding column
- `app/workers/notifications/create_round_robin_moderation_notifications_worker.rb:20` — `Article.find_by(id: notifiable_id)`
- `app/workers/notifications/milestone_worker.rb:8` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id)`
- `app/workers/notifications/subforem_change_notification_worker.rb:8` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id)`
- `app/workers/follows/update_points_worker.rb:7-9` — `Article.find_by(id: article_id); return unless article && user`

### “Is it published and a real article?”
- `app/models/notification.rb:65` — `return unless notifiable.is_a?(Article) && notifiable.published? && notifiable.type_of == "full_post"`
- `app/services/notifications/notifiable_action/send.rb:20` — `return unless notifiable.is_a?(Article)`
- `app/services/notifications/new_mention/send.rb:35` — `if mention.mentionable.is_a?(Article)`
- `app/services/notifications/update.rb:15` — only processes `Article` or `Comment`
- `app/services/notifications/moderation/send.rb:6` — `SUPPORTED = [Comment, Article].freeze`
- `app/services/mentions/create_all.rb:85-89` — branches on Article vs Comment
- `app/models/comment.rb:66-68` — `published_article` validation checks `commentable_type == "Article" && !commentable.published`
- `app/models/comment.rb:250` — `commentable_is_article?` checks `commentable_type == "Article"`
- `app/models/reaction.rb:257` — `return unless reactable_type == "Article" && !reactable&.published`
- `app/models/reaction.rb:279` — `return unless reactable.is_a?(Article)`
- `app/services/comments/calculate_score.rb:22` — checks `comment.commentable_type == "Article"` before activity update
- `app/services/edge_cache/bust_comment.rb:11` — checks `commentable.is_a?(Article)` before busting article cache
- `app/queries/comments/tree.rb:10` — checks `commentable.is_a?(Article)` for article comment trees
- `app/workers/concepts/classify_record_worker.rb:14` — `if record.is_a?(Article) && !record.published?`
- `app/workers/notifications/notifiable_action_worker.rb:8` — `return unless notifiable_type == "Article"`
- `app/workers/reactions/update_relevant_scores_worker.rb:21` — `return unless reaction.reactable_type == "Article" && reaction.visible_to_public?`

### Guard gaps / teardown risks
- `EdgeCache::BustArticle.call(article)` assumes a live object; workers like `BustCacheWorker` guard with `find_by`, but `before_destroy_actions` calls `bust_cache(destroying: true)` inline on the instance before it is gone.
- `Comments` are `dependent: :nullify`; destroy-time guards in `Articles::Destroyer` cache comment ids up front, but any worker already enqueued with a comment id will hit `commentable_type == "Article"` checks and may act on a missing article.
- `LiquidEmbeddable` and `WebpageTrackable` concerns fire `after_commit` on create/update only, but `WebpageTrackable` has a `before_destroy :capture_webpage_domains` + `after_destroy_commit :queue_webpage_domain_updates` for score cleanup.
- `Taggable` `sync_tags_array` runs `before_save`; if tag storage changes, the `tags_array` column and `cached_tag_list` scopes must stay consistent.

## Step 6 — Blast radius assessment

Ranked by likelihood of breaking if the Article contract (associations, callbacks, counters, cached fields, teardown order) changes.

### 🔴 High risk
1. **`app/services/articles/destroyer.rb:5`** — manually caches comment ids and removes notifications. Any change to how comments are detached or notifications are cleaned will orphan data or double-delete.
2. **`app/services/articles/updater.rb:15`** — branches on `became_published?` / `became_unpublished?` / `remains_published?` and calls `Mentions::CreateAll` inline. Changing publish semantics breaks notification consistency.
3. **`app/models/article.rb:1408-1420` (`before_destroy_actions`)** — coordinates cache busting for author/org other articles. Changing teardown order may skip cache purges.
4. **`app/models/article.rb:168-205` (associations & `dependent`)** — changing any `dependent` option changes what Rails deletes vs nullifies vs leaves. `comments dependent: :nullify` and `tag_adjustments` with no dependency are especially sensitive.
5. **`app/models/concerns/reactable.rb:1`** + **`app/models/reaction.rb:1`** — reactions are polymorphic; counter_culture and score calc depend on exact `reactable_type` / association behavior.
6. **`app/services/mentions/create_all.rb:5`** + **`app/services/notifications/notifiable_action/send.rb:19`** — mention exclusion logic depends on `notifiable.mentions` and `notifiable.is_a?(Article)`.
7. **`app/workers/articles/update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb:7`** — re-renders cards that embed this article; if article visibility changes, embeds go stale.
8. **`app/models/notification.rb:64-74`** — gate on `Article` + `published?` + `full_post`; changing visibility contract breaks follower notifications.
9. **`app/services/edge_cache/bust_article.rb:2`** — depends on `article.published`, `article.published_at`, `article.tag_list`, `article.user`, `article.organization`.

### 🟡 Medium risk
10. **Feed services** (`app/services/articles/feeds/*.rb`) — rely on `published`, `published_at`, `score`, `hotness_score`, `cached_tag_list`, `tags_array`.
11. **Search** (`app/models/concerns/algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb:1`, `pg_search_scope` in `article.rb:396`) — depends on `published`, `score`, `published_at`, `reading_list_document` trigger.
12. **AI workers** (`generate_summary_worker`, `generate_context_note_worker`, `generate_freeform_context_note_worker`, `detect_code_block_languages_worker`, `generate_article_embedding_worker`) — assume article exists and is published/high-score.
13. **Analytics / ArticleActivity** (`app/models/article_activity.rb`, `app/workers/articles/update_article_activity_worker.rb:17`) — denormalized counters from comments/reactions/pageviews.
14. **`app/services/notifications/update.rb:14`** — updates JSON caches of article user/org data.

### 🟢 Lower risk but must verify
15. **Admin charts/stats** — read-only aggregates.
16. **Sitemaps** — read-only published scopes.
17. **Badge automations** — read-only article scans.
18. **Data update scripts / migrations** — one-off or historical; unlikely to regress but must not leave stale assumptions.
